stories.title: Pats-Seahawks SB rematch to kick off '26 season
stories.summary: In a rematch of Super Bowl LX, the Seahawks will welcome the Patriots to Lumen Field for the 2026 NFL season opener, one of 272 games officially announced throughout the league Thursday night.

stories.title: Scheffler among largest throng atop PGA since '69
stories.summary: Scottie Scheffler carded a 67 and is tied with six other players -- the biggest logjam in 57 years after the first round of a major -- at the PGA Championship.

stories.title: Rahm apologizes for 'inexcusable' incident at PGA
stories.summary: Jon Rahm apologized for hitting a volunteer in the face and shoulder with a divot after he took a swing in frustration during the first round of the PGA Championship on Thursday.

stories.title: NBA: Refs right in no-call at end of Cavs-Pistons
stories.summary: The NBA said Thursday that officials were correct in not calling a foul on Jarrett Allen in the closing seconds of regulation of Game 5 between the Cavaliers and Pistons on Wednesday night.

stories.title: Mbappé benched, booed: Coach said I'm 4th-choice
stories.summary: Kylian Mbappé said Thursday Álvaro Arbeloa told him he was Real Madrid's "fourth-choice forward" after being benched and then whistled by fans.
